description: Add tailscale-authkey sops secret. Extend nixos-modules/tailscale.nix to use services.tailscale.authKeyFile when machine.features.devbox. Document acquisition of an ephemeral preauth key from the tailnet admin console.

comments.text: Reverted: auto-auth via sops would create reproducibility issues since tailscale auth keys expire (max 90d). Devbox tailnet registration is now manual: 'ssh $HOST sudo tailscale up' after first devbox-rebuild. Surfaced in devbox-bootstrap and devbox-rebuild post-messages.

title: Plumb Tailscale auto-auth on devboxes
